summary: Stunning 1986 show with a tight setlist and superb Stella Blue, captured on an excellent audience recording despite minor tinny quirks.
review: Reviewers rave about the performance – calling the setlist tight, the playing wonderful, and highlighting Supplication and an all‑time great Stella Blue. The tape is praised as one of the best audience recordings available, though a few note a tinny midrange, vocal lapses and a messy start to Set 2. Overall the music outweighs the recording flaws.

ai_rating.rationale: Four reviews (three 5‑star, one 4‑star) praise the show’s musical quality; two explicitly call the audience recording excellent, while only minor technical complaints lower the score slightly.

recording_quality.technical_notes: Generally clear and lively audience capture, regarded as one of the best available; however listeners mention a tinny mid‑range, occasional vocal dropouts and a messy beginning to Set 2.

show_quality.setlist_flow: Setlist described as tight and wonderfully played; the overall flow is praised even though the start of Set 2 feels a bit chaotic.
